sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>

ascii_lines = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')

# Read both center regions
print("Center 1 (rows 22-27, cols 28-33):")
for r in range(22, 28):
    print(f"  Row {r}: '{ascii_lines[r][28:34]}'")

print("\nCenter 2 (rows 38-43, cols 28-33):")
for r in range(38, 44):
    print(f"  Row {r}: '{ascii_lines[r][28:34]}'")

# Check current grid colors
print("\nCurrent grid colors:")
block_positions = [
    (14, 20), (14, 28), (14, 36),
    (22, 20), (22, 36),
    (30, 20), (30, 28), (30, 36),
    (38, 20), (38, 36),
    (46, 20), (46, 28), (46, 36),
]
grid = []
row_labels = [0, 0, 0, 1, 1, 2, 2, 2, 3, 3, 4, 4, 4]
col_labels = [0, 1, 2, 0, 2, 0, 1, 2, 0, 2, 0, 1, 2]
for i, (r, c) in enumerate(block_positions):
    color = ascii_lines[r][c]
    grid.append((row_labels[i], col_labels[i], color))
    print(f"  ({row_labels[i]},{col_labels[i]}): {color}")

# Build grid matrix
grid_matrix = {}
for r_idx, c_idx, color in grid:
    grid_matrix[(r_idx, c_idx)] = color

print("\nGrid matrix:")
for r in range(5):
    for c in range(3):
        if (r,c) in grid_matrix:
            print(f"  {grid_matrix[(r,c)]}", end="")
        else:
            print(f"  ?", end="")
    print()
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
